description_long: This is a two-story urban bakery building with a playful, retro aesthetic, featuring a mix of pastel blue and beige walls. The ground floor has a striped blue-and-white awning above the entrance, flanked by vending machines and arcade cabinets, and a large yellow and red sign with Japanese text. The upper floor includes a tiled roof section, potted plants, and a rooftop area with pixel-art signage referencing classic video games. The side wall displays pixelated Space Invader graphics, while the rear has utility boxes and stacked cardboard. The building sits on a paved sidewalk base, with additional signage and vending machines enhancing its street presence. Decorative elements such as a beckoning cat sign and rooftop greenery add to its charm.
description: A colorful, two-story urban bakery with retro gaming and Japanese-inspired signage, striped awning, vending machines, and rooftop pixel-art decorations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with a blue-and-white awning, large yellow and red Japanese sign, vending machines, and a sidewalk display board.
description_view_1: Side view reveals pixel-art Space Invader graphics, arcade cabinets, and a partial view of the awning and vending machines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain beige wall, utility boxes, a small door, stacked cardboard boxes, and rooftop pixel-art signs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights a beckoning cat sign, vending machines, trash bins, and the continuation of the striped awning and signage.
attribute_storefront_signage: The storefront features a large, rectangular yellow sign with red Japanese text, mounted above the entrance. There is also a vertical sign with a beckoning cat illustration on the side, and pixel-art signage on the rooftop referencing classic video games. The signage is colorful, uses bold fonts, and is made of painted or printed materials, prominently placed above and beside the entrance.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A blue-and-white striped fabric awning is present above the main entrance. There is no visible bakery branding, logos, or text on the awning itself.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a blend of contemporary Japanese urban style with playful retro and arcade-inspired decorative elements, including tiled roofing, pixel-art signage, and a mix of traditional and modern features.
